app_500_errors.query: service:(my-app-web OR my-worker-sql OR my-worker-http) env:qa-west @http.status_code:500

app_all_errors.query: service:(my-app-web OR my-worker-sql OR my-worker-http) env:qa-west status:error

app_slow_requests.query: service:(my-app-web OR my-worker-sql OR my-worker-http) env:qa-west @duration:>5000000000

app_exception_logs.description: Application Services - Logs with stack traces
